## Session Learnings

- [[adversarial-review-multi-lens]] — Three independent review lenses (per-task, Codex, Opus) catch different defect classes; stack them.
- [[subagent-driven-execution]] — Cost model (~3-4× naive), when subagent-driven fits, when it doesn't.
- [[default-on-hooks-opt-in]] — Hooks that mutate user output must ship opt-in; split views need one rebuild path; marker files beat transcript scans.
